key_insight: Theoria turns answer verification into auditable state rewrites, so every change must be explicitly justified and hidden assumptions are exposed instead of silently accepted.
engineering_relevance: This is useful for deploying AI in high-stakes math and reasoning workflows because it offers traceable, post-hoc verifiable certification rather than opaque scalar judgments.
method: Rewrite candidate solutions into typed proof-state transitions.
Require each transition to be licensed by an explicit justification such as a citation, computation, or problem-given fact.
Check the completeness of change so any unaccounted difference appears as an unlicensed mutation.
evidence_signal: On HLE-Verified Gold, Theoria certified 105/185 problems at 91.4% strict precision, and on 95 adversarial poisoned proofs it caught 94.7%, outperforming holistic judges on hidden-premise and fabricated-citation errors.
watch_item: The system depends on the quality of rewrite rules and justifications, so coverage may still be limited on problems whose validity is hard to decompose into transparent state transitions.
paper_title: Theoria: Rewrite-Acceptability Verification over Informal Reasoning States
